details.description: Nighttime scene at a cliffside, multi-terraced lounge/bar illuminated almost entirely by red and warm amber lights. The space is built from wood, stone, and reclaimed materials with eclectic Bedouin/Oriental decor: hanging lanterns, string lights tracing railings and rooflines, carved panels, and numerous steps and platforms climbing the hillside. People are seated and standing on lower terraces while stairways lead upward through densely decorated levels. The sky is black, emphasizing the glowing lights and layered construction of the venue.

details.description: Nighttime scene featuring a dense, multi-level wooden structure built from pallets and planks, forming staircases and terraces that climb a rocky backdrop. The installation is illuminated intensely with red and orange lights, creating a fiery glow across the wooden framework and surrounding area. Soft lanterns and string lights line the edges, casting warm hues and strong silhouettes of the people gathered around the base. The overall impression is of an outdoor art installation or themed entertainment space, possibly part of a resort or nightlife area near the coast. The sky is dark, and no natural water features are visible within the frame, though the setting hints at a seaside locale (El Fanar area vicinity).

details.description: Nighttime view inside a densely decorated, multi‑level cliffside lounge. Warm red and amber lights from countless hanging lanterns, string lights, and small table lamps illuminate wooden terraces stacked steeply up a rocky slope. A central wooden staircase rises through the scene, flanked by carved wood panels, vintage signs, and eclectic ornaments. The venue is crowded, with people seated at low tables on the lower level while additional platforms ascend above. The sky is pitch black, and the overall look is bohemian and lantern‑lit—strongly matching the well‑known Farsha Mountain Lounge (Farsha Café) in Hadaba, Sharm El Sheikh.

details.description: An indoor, cave-like entertainment venue interior at night in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt. The space features rough, grotto-like walls and ceiling with warm red and amber lighting. A wooden staircase rises diagonally along the right side, around which a dense crowd is gathered, with groups of people in the foreground. The atmosphere is lively and crowded, suggesting a nightlife bar/restaurant or themed attraction, with decorative lights and eclectic objects contributing to a festive, cluttered ambiance.

details.description: A nighttime view looking up at the terraced, multi-level structure of Farsha Cafe (also known as Farsha Mountain Lounge). The scene is bathed in a deep, atmospheric red light, accented by the warm yellow glow of numerous hanging lanterns and string lights. The architecture is rustic and eclectic, built into a cliffside with wooden staircases connecting the various seating areas. The space is densely decorated in a bohemian style with a chaotic but cozy arrangement of antiques, vintage signs, old doors, rugs, and bric-a-brac lining the walls and ceilings. Patrons can be seen seated at low tables in the dimly lit alcoves.

details.description: A vibrant night-time scene of a multi-level cliffside lounge, heavily decorated with an eclectic mix of lanterns, rugs, and traditional artifacts. The entire area is illuminated with a strong red glow, complemented by warm yellow lights from numerous lamps. Wooden staircases and platforms create a complex, tiered structure where people are seen relaxing. The style is bohemian and rustic, typical of the Farsha Mountain Lounge in Sharm El Sheikh.

details.description: Nighttime scene in a steep, lantern‑lit alley of a hillside market street. A long flight of stone steps climbs between closely packed wooden storefronts and balconies. Red/orange paper lanterns and strings of warm bulbs line the stairway and eaves, creating an intense red glow. Crowds move along the steps. The architecture is vernacular East Asian with timber facades, carved wood details, hanging signs, and teahouse/restaurant fronts typical of a famous old street viewpoint.

details.description: A lively nighttime market street scene bathed in red light. A narrow row of wooden market stalls lines the passage, with warm string lights and hanging red lanterns creating a festively lit corridor. The walls along the street are covered in graffiti artwork, contributing an urban, bohemian backdrop. People are visible in the crowded passage, walking, browsing, and conversing around the stalls. Signs and colorful decorations line the scene, casting a vivid, saturated glow typical of a busy street market at night.

The photo appears taken in low light with a strong red color cast, likely during an evening event or in a bar/attraction queue area.

details.description: A crowded nighttime street scene with festive lighting, likely a night market or street festival. The scene is bathed in red light from numerous decorative lamps and neon elements. A line of warm string lights runs along the upper area, and walls or stalls are covered with banners, posters, and decorations. A dense crowd occupies a narrow passage on the right side, with stalls or a float-like structure visible among the people. The left half of the frame is dark, suggesting the photo is cropped or rotated. Overall, the atmosphere is lively and busy, characteristic of a night market or street festival.

details.description: The image, which is oriented vertically with the top of the scene on the left, depicts the vibrant and chaotic interior of a famous 'ruin bar' at night. The scene is dominated by intense red ambient lighting and strings of warm fairy lights. The space is a multi-level courtyard or atrium within a dilapidated building, densely packed with eclectic decor including wooden wagon wheels, mannequins, vintage junk, and random bric-a-brac suspended from the ceiling and walls. On the right side (the ground level), patrons are seated at tables, socializing in the dimly lit, atmospheric setting. The architecture features rough, exposed textures and upper-level galleries typical of converted tenement buildings in this district.

entities.name: Szimpla Kert
entities.notes: The most famous 'ruin bar' in Budapest, established in a dilapidated building.

details.description: A photograph taken at night inside a densely decorated and eclectic space, characteristic of a Budapest ruin bar. The scene is bathed in a saturated red light, creating a high-contrast and moody atmosphere. The walls and ceiling are covered with a chaotic collection of miscellaneous objects, vintage items, and numerous small, glowing lights. A wooden staircase is visible on the right side of the frame (when oriented correctly). Several people are seen sitting and standing throughout the space, mostly appearing as dark silhouettes against the red glow. The overall aesthetic is bohemian, cluttered, and vibrant. The image appears to be rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise from its natural orientation.

entities.name: Szimpla Kert
entities.notes: The most famous and original ruin bar in Budapest, known for its eclectic decor and use of recycled materials.

entities.name: Ruin bar
entities.notes: A unique style of bar found in Budapest, typically located in abandoned buildings and decorated with mismatched, vintage items.

entities.name: Jewish Quarter
entities.notes: The Erzsébetváros district of Budapest, where most ruin bars are located.
